core_principles: Contrast: Deepest Blacks vs Neon Light

theme.instructions: The site must always be in dark mode. Override default light mode variables if necessary.

headings.name: Syne
headings.usage: Use for all H1-H3. weights 700/800 for Hero, 400/500 for subheads.

body.name: Outfit
body.usage: Use for body text, UI elements, buttons.

mono.name: Space Mono
mono.usage: Use for decorative tags, numbers, and technical details.

buttons.primary: group relative px-8 py-4 bg-white text-black rounded-full font-medium hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-300 overflow-hidden
buttons.secondary: px-8 py-4 border border-white/20 rounded-full text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
buttons.magnetic: Implement magnetic effect on hover using Framer Motion

cards.service: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-8 hover:border-cyan-500/50 transition-colors duration-500 group

cursor.behavior: Follows mouse with delay (lerp). Expands on hover over interactive elements. Mix-blend-mode: difference.

visual_enhancers.noise: Overlay a fixed noise texture with low opacity (3%) to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.glows: Use colored blurs behind key elements (Hero text, CTA) to create depth.
visual_enhancers.parallax: Images and text should move at different speeds on scroll.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px borders with low opacity. Use 'tracing beam' effect on active cards.

transitions.page_load: Staggered reveal of elements from bottom-up.
transitions.text_reveal: Split text into words/chars and animate y-axis + opacity.

icons.style: Thin strokes (1.5px), neon color on hover.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is readable on dark backgrounds (WCAG AA).
accessibility.reduced_motion: Disable parallax and heavy movement if prefers-reduced-motion is true.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels.
accessibility.testing: Use data-testid attributes for all interactive elements.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALLATION: Run 'yarn add framer-motion gsap @studio-freight/lenis lucide-react clsx tailwind-merge'
2. CONFIG: Update tailwind.config.js to include the colors and fonts defined above.
3. STRUCTURE: Create a layout wrapper that initializes Lenis scroll.
4. DEVELOP: Start with the Hero section. Use the 'magnetic' button effect and large Syne typography.
5. INTERACTION: Every hover must provide feedback. No dead clicks.
6. TESTING: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes.
7. FILE EXTENSION: Use .js and .jsx for files as requested.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text unless it is a very large heading.
Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry.
Use glass-morphism with backdrop-blur-xl for the navbar.
Do not use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Syne'.
Add a global noise overlay using fixed position div with pointer-events-none.
